value: MCP server resolves the project file via arch.projectResolution (CODEX_PROJECT env → MCP client roots → cwd walk-up). Old CODEX_PROJECT_DIR and --cwd launcher hints still work but now apply via setProjectRootOverride, not process.chdir, and work whether the server is run as a binary or imported. Pin deterministically by setting "env": { "CODEX_PROJECT": "<repo path>" } in the codexcli MCP block of .claude.json.
